name: SAM.gov Contract Opportunities
whenToUse: Use for active and planned contract opportunities with contracting-office visibility.

name: SBIR / STTR
whenToUse: Best for early government traction, technical validation, and non-dilutive prototyping capital.

name: OTA / Consortium
whenToUse: Useful for prototypes, pilots, and commercial solutions when speed and flexibility matter.

name: CRADA / PIA / Lab Evaluation
whenToUse: Strong for testing, joint development, and credibility building with labs or mission teams.

name: Tradewinds / DIU / SCO
whenToUse: Good for venture-backed companies with commercial traction and a near-term prototype story.

name: Prime / Teaming / GSA Vehicles
whenToUse: Useful when direct-to-government sales are slower than piggybacking on existing vehicles or incumbents.
